chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P No.D-2043 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 17-04-2025 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General along with Fida Hussain Solangi, SPS/SP/AIGP legal on behalf of DIG Police Sukkur Range.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the petitioner. Fida Hussain Solangi, SPS/SP/AIGP Legal, appears on behalf of the DIG Police Sukkur Range and submits compliance reports, which are taken on record. He further submits that the grievance of the petitioner has been redressed. Since, no one is in attendance for the petitioner and in view of the statement made by the official respondents, the instant petition stands disposed of accordingly. J U D G E J U D G E Naveed Ali
